sections.sectionTitle: Jew mite in Paul a Mawhsakna

verses.text: Tua khit ni nga ciangin siampi lianpenpa Ananias leh upate, amau' thu a gensak ding Tertullas a kici mipa tawh Jerusalem khua panin Sisaria khua-ah hong tung uh a, menzipa Feliks kiangah pai-in Paul a mawhsakna uh thute a va gen uh hi

Thugen dingin Tertullas a kisawl ciangin hih a nuai-a bangin mawhsakna thu a gen hi: “A Lian Menzipa! Nangma hong makaih siamna hangin hun saupi sungnuamtakin ka omkhin uh a, kote' gamsung a hoihna dingin puahphatna zong tampi tak kibawl khin hi
Hih thute hangin nang tungah mi khempeuh ka lungdam mahmah uh hi
Na hun tampi tak hong beisak nuamlo ka hih manun thu a tom theithei-a kong gennate uh hehpihna tawh nong ngaihna dingin ka hong thum uh hi
Hih mipa, buaina a piangsak, a kihtakhuai mi ahihna ka mu uh hi. Mun khempeuha om Jew mite lakah buaina piangsak a, Nazareth mi pawl a kicite a makaipa ahi hi
Biakinn nangawn thusim loin min siatsak sawm ahih manin amah ka man uh hi. (Komau' thukham tawh kizui-in ama tungah thu khen ka sawm uh hi
Ahi zongin galkapmangpa Lysias hong pai-in kote kiang panin amah hong kaikhia hi
Tua ciangin amah a mawhsakte, nangma kiangah hong paina dingin Lysias in thu a pia hi.) Tu-in hih mipa thu sit lecin, ka mawhsakna uh thu khempeuh nangmah in na thei ding hi,” a ci hi
Jew mite in zong pan'pih uh a, hih a gen khempeuh a man mah ahi hi, ci-in a gen uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Feliks mai-ah Jew mite' Mawhsaknate Paul in a Phelna

verses.text: Paul in thu a genna dingin menzipa in a khut tawh a lah ciangin Paul in, “Hih minamte tungah thukhenin sauveipi na omkhitna thu ka hongthei hi; kei hong kimawhsaknate nangma mai-ah pheltheihna ding hun ngah ka hih manin ka nuam mahmah hi
Nangmahmah in na theihding mah bangin, Jerusalem khua-ah Pasian bia dingin ka paina pen ni sawm leh ni nih khawng pha pan hi

Biakinnsung ahi a, kikhopna innsung ahi a, khuasung mun khat peuhpeuhah ahi zongin mi khat peuhpeuh tawh ka kitotna ahi a, mihon in thusia a bawlna dingin ka hanthotna ahi zongin, hih Jew mite in hong mu hetlo ding uh hi
Tu-a kei hong mawhsaknate uh zong a manna thu hong lakthei hetlo ding uh hi

Ahi zongin nangma kiangah kong pulaknop thu in: Amaute in manlo hi, a cih uh tua Thu zui-in kote' pu leh pate' Pasian ka bia hi. Moses' Thukham laibu sunga a kigelh thu khempeuh leh kamsangte' laibu sunga a kigelhte khempeuh zong ka um hi
Amaute' up leh lamet mah bangin, Pasian in miphate leh misiate a kibangin sihna panin hingkik sak khawm ding hi, ci-in umin ka lamen hi
Tua ahih manin Pasian mai leh mite mai-ah lungsim kisuan'na a om hetlo dingin a tawntungin ka gamta hi
“Jerusalem panin kum tampi sung ka paikhiat khit ciangin ka mipihte a kihuhna sumte a puakding leh gan go-in Pasian a bia dingin Jerusalem-ah ka pai hi
Biakinn sungah keimah kisian'suahna ka bawlkhit hun ciangin amaute in kei hong mu uh a, buaina zong bangmah omlo hi
Tua laitakin Asia gam panin a hong pai Jew mite pawlkhat om uh hi. Kei mawhsakna ding thu a neih uh leh amaute mahmah hong pai-in nangma mai-ah hong gen ding uh a kilawm ahi hi
Tua ahih kei leh zong, uliante mai-ah thusitna thuakin ka om laitakin ka mawhna bang mu uh ahi hiam, cih thu hih mite gensak in
Amaute' mai-ah, ‘Mi site hingkik ding hi, ci-in ka upna hangin kei tungah thu nong khen uh hi,’ ci-in ka gen simloh amaute' hehna ding bangmah omlo hi,” ci-in thu a gen hi.
Tua ciangin tua Thu paizia teltakin a thei Feliks in a thusitna hialbawl a, “Galkapmangpa Lysias hong tun' ciangin na thu uh kong khensak ding hi,” ci-in a genkhit ciangin
Paul cin'ding tavuan a la bupa kiangah thu pia a, “Paul hoihtakin cingsak in la, ahi zongin a lawmte in a kisapna peuhpeuh a piaktheihna dingun kimuh theihna ding hun pia zel in,” ci-in a vaikhak hi
Tua zawh a sawtloin Feliks leh Jew mi ahi a zi Drusilla, Paul a kikhumna-ah hong pai-in amah samkhiasak uh a, Paul in Jesuh Khrih upna thu a gennate a nupa-un a ngai uh hi

Ahi zongin Paul in thu gengenin, a hoihin a gamtatna ding, pumpi ki-uk zawhna ding, leh hong tungding Thukhenna Hunte a gen tohtoh ciangin, Feliks hong lau a, “Va paikik phot in. Hun ka ngah ciangin kong samkik ding hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Paul in sumgolh zong hong pia thei leh ci-in ngaihsunkawm ahih manin Paul kiangah va pai zelin a kiho zelzel uh ahi hi
Ahi zongin tua zawh kum nih hong bei ciangin Feliks sepna pen Porsias Festas in hong laih hi. Feliks in Jew mite' pahtak ding ut ahih manin thong sungah Paul a omsak suak hi.
